profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Nanotech Indonesia Global Tbk provides technology and engineering research and development services in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments, Service and Trading. It engages in travel agencies, bureau, tourism, nature tourism information, management consulting, employment, and education businesses, as well as operates in the manufacturing and trading industries. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is headquartered in South Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Nanotech Indonesia Global Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Nanotech Investama Sedaya.
